posts.text:
Folks should read the story being derided here:

nytimes.com/2001/10/31/world…



Ari Fleischer (@AriFleischer)

Today’s media cheer against the US, overstate enemy abilities, understate ours and paint a picture that the US is losing, while we’re winning. It’s more true today as they cheer against Trump in Iran. 

Within 10 days weeks of this 2001 NYT doozy saying our military efforts in Afghanistan were bogged down, the key city of Mazar e Sharif fell to the US and our ally the Northern Allianc
